name: io.github.blazickjp/arxiv-mcp-server
description: Enable AI assistants to search and access arXiv research papers through MCP. Supports full-text download, semantic search, citation graphs, and paper alerts.

packageArguments.name: --storage-path
packageArguments.description: Directory for storing downloaded papers. Defaults to ~/.arxiv-mcp-server/papers.

environmentVariables.name: ARXIV_STORAGE_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Optional path for storing downloaded papers locally.
